title: achillea virescens subsp. virescens
intro: Achillea virescens subsp. virescens, also known as yarrow, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of yarrow include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating menstrual cramps, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and colds. Yarrow can be consumed as a tea, added to salads, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions.
